comment: Published lyrics from Heyward & Ira Gershwin. Partial coverage -- m3-m5 fix opening line; m14 wipes a misattributed phrase (without GT verification of what the published wants there, naked is better than wrong).

3.comment: Pre-fix had 'I got plen ty o'' which is correct, just preserving here.

14.comment: Pre-fix had spurious 'Got a. lock' here misattributed from elsewhere in the verse. Wiping to naked rather than guessing the published lyric without page-2 image verification.
